description.en: Returns adoublerepresenting the direction towards which the device is facing. This value, specified in degrees, indicates how far off from heading true north the device is.0degrees represents true north, and the direction is determined clockwise (which means that east is90degrees and west is270degrees). Ifspeedis0or the device is unable to provideheadinginformation,headingisnull.
